title: Rubio Senate testimony — Iran must agree to 'severe and long-term' nuclear limits; 30-60-90 day timeline; Iran showing new flexibility
snippet: Secretary of State Marco Rubio testifies before Senate: Iran must agree to 'severe and long-term' nuclear limitations. No sanctions relief for Hormuz reopening alone. Nuclear talks are 'highly technical, could take months' with 30-60-90 day timeline. Positive note: Iran 'agreed to negotiate aspects they refused to mention a year ago,' suggesting new flexibility on nuclear issues.
tag_reason: 신규 사건 — 루비오 국무장관 상원 증언. 이란 핵 제한 요구, 30-60-90일 협상 타임라인 제시, 이란의 새로운 유연성 언급. 핵 협상의 구체적 윤곽 최초 공개
